name: Dheonix
description: A dheonix is the demonic counterpart of the phoenix, often portrayed as a harbinger of the end times — a massive bird-shaped demon wreathed in dark flames. This enormous creature is notoriously difficult to kill, able to reform within the fires it creates. Its wingspan blots out the sun and its shriek heralds destruction.
tactics: The dheonix fights primarily from the air, using its flight speed to stay out of melee range. It opens by scattering dheonix fires across the battlefield with Firebolt and Dheonix Fire, then pulses them with Dark Pulse to suppress the party. When cornered or badly damaged, it detonates with Font of Flames to reform at a dheonix fire and reset the fight. It uses Noxious Smoke to punish any creature that tries to land a decisive blow. The party must recognize that extinguishing all dheonix fires before the dheonix is killed — or immediately when it dies — is the only path to permanent victory.

actions.name: Talon Rake
actions.description: The dheonix swoops past a creature, raking them with its massive talons for physical damage. If the dheonix has moved at least 3 units this turn before using this action, it deals an additional 2 damage.

actions.name: Firebolt
actions.description: The dheonix hurls a projectile of dark flame at a creature, dealing heat damage. Any flammable surface struck by this attack ignites.

actions.name: Dheonix Fire
actions.description: The dheonix targets a flame within moderate (20 unit) range and converts it to dheonix fire — the flame turns black and pulses with dark energy. Any creature that touches a dheonix fire to extinguish it takes 5 dark damage. Dheonix fires cannot be extinguished by nonmagical means.

actions.name: Dark Pulse
actions.description: The dheonix targets itself or a dheonix fire within moderate (20 unit) range, causing it to pulse with dark energy in a very short (5 unit) radius. All creatures in the area must make a resilience check of 7 or higher or take dark damage. Any normal flames in the area are converted to dheonix fires.

actions.name: Font of Flames
actions.description: The dheonix detonates itself in a catastrophic explosion of fire and dark energy, striking all creatures within a very short (5 unit) radius. The dheonix is destroyed by this action. All flames created by the explosion are automatically converted to dheonix fires. The dheonix cannot reform via Dark Rebirth in the same round it uses this action.

reactions.name: Noxious Smoke
reactions.description: Trigger: A creature targets the dheonix with an attack or spell. The dheonix emits a cloud of noxious smoke in a very short (5 unit) radius around itself or around a dheonix fire within moderate (20 unit) range. The attacking creature must make a resilience check of 7 or higher or suffer a penalty die on their attack.
reactions.trigger: A creature targets the dheonix with an attack or spell.

traits.name: Dark Rebirth
traits.description: As long as at least one dheonix fire exists, the dheonix cannot be permanently destroyed. At the start of the round after being destroyed, the dheonix reforms 4 units above one of its dheonix fires with 60 health. The dheonix cannot reform in the same round it used Font of Flames. If all dheonix fires are extinguished before the dheonix reforms, it is destroyed permanently.

traits.name: Greater Demon
traits.description: The dheonix takes only half damage from physical sources that are not the result of a magical effect or a weapon with the silvered property.
